It has Victory Points for eliminating enemy units.

PartOf: It is part of the four-game collection Blue & Gray: Four American Civil War Battles.

BelongsTo: It belongs to the American Civil War era.

It belongs to the Blue & Gray series.
It belongs to the Japanese edition.
KnownFor: It is known for simulating the Battle of Antietam.
It is known for being the bloodiest day in American history.
It is known for its simple rules.
It is known for the "Attack Effectiveness" concept.
It is known for its popularity among SPI games.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Battle of Antietam.

It is about the American Civil War.
It is about the bloodiest day in American history.
It is about Confederate General Robert E. Lee's Army of Northern Virginia.
It is about the Army of the Potomac commanded by Major General George B. McClellan.

It was influenced by the "I Go, You Go" game system.
It was influenced by the disorganization of the Union command structure at that time.
It was influenced by the popularity of the Blue & Gray quadrigame.
It was influenced by the rules limiting Union movement.
